title: "Put Grandpa up in a home": Candace Owens fires back at the President with brutal jab after explosive rant
summary_full: Candace Owens sharply escalated her feud with Donald Trump by posting, “It may be time to put Grandpa up in a home,” after his lengthy rant attacking her and other former allies. Trump labeled them “low IQ” and “troublemakers,” deepening divisions within his circle. Owens’ brief but pointed response quickly went viral, highlighting a growing and very public fracture among once-aligned conservative voices.
